import JudgeProblem
import Lean

initialize do
  -- Can we spawn a process?
  let child ← IO.Process.spawn {
    cmd := "echo"
    args := #["hello from spawned process"]
    stdout := IO.Process.Stdio.piped
    stderr := IO.Process.Stdio.piped
  }
  let stdout ← child.stdout.readToEnd
  let exitCode ← child.wait
  IO.eprintln s!"Spawned process stdout: {stdout}"
  IO.eprintln s!"Exit code: {exitCode}"

def submission : Goal := by
  intro G _ h
  intro x y z
  rw [← h, h]
